Description:
▪ Supercategories: Add Super Categories / Edit & Delete Super Categories

▪ Categories: Add Categories / Edit & Delete Categories / Addon Properties
Categories have "checkbox" properties to enable a set of properties example: Addons/combos/not in billing etc for that respective category

Addons - categories to be used to hold addons
Combo - category to be used for combo mapping of items
Not in weborder - exclude items from web ordering platform(posist weborder)
Not in Billing - category doesn't show on regular billing page for punching
Addon as Normal item - Addons can be tagged as addon's and can be punched as a normal item

▪ Add Items / Search to Edit & Delete Items
Mandatory Fields marked with "X or dropdown" - Item Name/ Item Number/ Category/ Rate

Item Name - enter name of item *Mandatory*
Item UID - 1 time Unique Code - type first digit, and manually choose the number from the dropdown list *Mandatory*
Universal Item - not in use
Description - Item Description can be provided - which would reflect under Aggregator websites
Services - portion for number of people
Item Number - item number sequencing
Rate - cost of the item *Mandatory*
Fixed Cost - as per recipe a cost can be defined
SAP code - for Account software SAP integration
Veg/Non veg - tagging mark
Not in Sweet Shop - "Sweet Shop configuration(deployment)" - Sell in qtys - 200gms/500gms/1kg
Retail Items - can be used for MRP retail items (for Stock Raw materials)
Package - would be used only banquet module (Buffet package 1, buffet package 2)
Has Variant - Half/ full versions of items - (used with Aggregators Menu management)

Can create commonly used comment tags such as, "Extra Ice/ no Sugar/ no onions etc" which can be tagged onto individual items for use at the time of taking an order
▪ Add, Edit & Delete Comments
▪ Comment Mapping for use on front end POS

Create Addons under Items and assign them into an "Addon Properties Category"

Under Addon Map - all addons will show on the left.
Tag/map items to the specific addons

Create & bifurcate menu items as per sections Example: Beverages, Chinese, Continental, Indian, Pastas & Pizzas etc
This is used for reporting purposes for comparison of different groups of items

Can Create and define Sections, Edit & Delete Sections

Mapping all items as regular food or liquor
Used for reports and also Splitting bills for customers by food/liquor

Create & Define Taxes, example GST / VAT, service tax or other charges.
Define the tax being percentage/fixed amount.


Edit & Delete Tax / Tax Properties Function available

Can define properties: gst/gst on serv. charge/mandatory tax/charge

Upload Item images and assign to specific items.
Be sure to select checkbox "Save as Original Image" before assigning.

Used for Zomato and few other aggregators with two way integration
Item Image size Zomato: 400x400 - 1600x1600 pixels; less than 5mb image size

Create Combo items under Items and assign them into a "Combo Properties Category"

Group - add groups to create a group of options for the combo - example: Main Course group/ drinks group/ desserts group
Edit name of group by clicking on Group 1 (left hand side)
Select Category and choose either all items / a specific item from the Category.
"+" can be used to add more choices within the group
Min / Max qty - can be assigned to increase / decrease number of items that can be selected in the group
Item Max qty - place a max qty of each item that can be selected

Price - any additional price to be charged for the group can be entered. Default is 0 
Differential Pricing option can be selected to add the items Original Pricing


Level - if within a group, want to add 1st:base level, 2nd: Upgrade level, etc... with different pricing
Tag update choices as "upgrade level"

Press Next: to assign Date range & other customizations

Used for QR Menu Integration /Barcode Integration.
Used to obtain barcodes to print for each item
Add Custom Groups - for reporting purposes

Tag items associated to each other - for reporting purposes
Example: Burger, fries, coke etc
Assign short forms for long names - especially useful for KOT/ KDS to avoid using too much printing space with large item names.
Create predefined comments for Void/ reprint, Complementary and other bill functionality.
Create Predefined discount with defined percentage values

Or Bill To Company, gives access to creating companies and adding employees(with employee ID's) on a tab basis.

Can be used where multiple employees visit a restaurant on a credit basis.
Bills are later compiled and payment collected either by parties concerned or by the company at a later time(end of the month)

Settlement is made via the BTC section.

Creating Items with "Has Variant" checkbox property assigns the items into this tab.

Ideally 3 or more items are created.
1 Base Item with 0 Pricing, checked as "has variant"
Half and full shouldn't be tagged under "has variant" - but are mapped under this section to the respective base item.
Tags can be specifically designed and mapped to several items.
Format -  Activate/Deactivate Categories  & Apply Taxes & Packaging Charges  to Categories & Items
Used to search and review items created at the Brand Level

Create & manage Tabs(Main Billing Interface) for variety of POS operations:
Table/ Take Out/ Delivery/ Banquet

Names and Details can be specified with the Properties of Operations selected.
Priority can be Determined for the order of the Tab

Taxes created at the Brand Level, can be assigned to the relevant Tabs.
Specific Tabs can have taxes associated with their operations. Example Service Tax is only for Dine, but not delivery

▪ Cascade tax can be stacked. Example GST on Service Tax.

All taxes can be edited, deleted or reassigned to relevant tabs.

Used to Activate "Categories" from the brand level as Active or inactive status in each tab

Also used for Category-level Taxation basis tax bracket required

Used to further apply tax brackets to specific items within Categories.

Can disable items without taxes example MRP items.

For Banquet Module.
Used to Assign Taxes for Additional Banquet Services, eg - Decorations, DJ, Compare etc

Review all items available within the brand.
Can Search & Activate / Deactivate items CLUSTER WISE from this section

Can be used to configure rates with items for separate tabs
Example Dine in can have a separate rate from Delivery/ Takeaway tabs.

Individual items can also be activated/ deactivated

Every individual item can have different sessions in which pricing can be different from each other, So a outlet can have same item on multiple prices on the basis of sessions, i.e : breakfast, lunch and dinner

Update All Deployment/ Outlet Details:
Name, Mobile Number, Address, GST/ VAT no, Company Name, Franchise, Preferred Language, Daily Emailer (scheduler setting for Enterprise ID only)
Here, user can active and deactivate items on outlet/deployment level
Every deployment can have their own charges like packaging charges, service charges. Also, the taxes on brand level can also cascade the charges - All of this can be done on deployment level
Day Sessions - Day sessions are being made to bifurcate the day timings into breakfast, lunch and dinner - All the sales then can be divided into sessions for the day
When user use complimentary offer, so they have to define that this complimentary item is going to this complimentary head - basically a name

Bills to comapny can be define on outlet too, herer we can define the company name, employee names, their id number, address lines and  mobile and email facility so that a bill can directly assign to a specific employee of specific company
An outlet can have locations to run on, beyond these location it wouldn't work

We have a option of predefine comments, for example:- Void, Discount, Complementary, Re Print, Kot, Cash Variance, Bill, Kitchen Message, Online/Advance Order Rejection, ExpressOffer(Billwise), Kot-Reprint, Reason (Manual EDC), Remove Charges

Locations can be added for Area Wise Delivery purposes.
Each Outlet has it's locations assigned. Beyond that location, other outlets can take over.
Used for integration with One Click (Third party company in Dubai)

The same as setting Dynamic Pricings at Cluster Level.
Every individual item can have different sessions in which pricing can be different from each other, So a outlet can have same item on multiple prices on the basis of sessions, i.e : breakfast, lunch and dinner

Offers created and Brand & Deployment Level can be selected as an Default/ Automatically Applied offer.

This will take effect for every bill punched into the system, 
(manually can be deleted from "Offers" button on front end POS)

Permissions can be enabled for specific users only.
- Scan Barcode To Print Bill - can be utilized for bakery type items where scanning action of a barcode punches to print the bill
- Allow accept without printing KOT - for online orders, can skip KOT printing and accept the bill
- Seperate Button To Mark Food Ready - Keep an MFR button ready to split the food ready from Dispatch(For online orders)
- Show Veg / Non-Veg Flag - marks veg items as green, non-veg items as red on main billing punching screen
- Cancel Item after Print Bill - allows void post printing a bill
- Enable Sweet Shop - enables sweet shot functionality - 100 gms/250gms/ 1kg - gram qty can be added to change price for sale portion wise
- Deployment Alias -  enables to mark a pseudo name for an alias to avoid confusion
- Enable Comment to Void Bill - Voiding a bill will require a comment
- Enable Comment to Edit Bill - editing a bill will require a comment
- Manager Permission On: Bill TransferKot Transfer Item TransferVoid KotVoid/Change Item Qty - set permissions for the choice of activity
- Auto Start New Bill - auto starts a new bill after one is closed
- Reset SerialNumber Daily - bill series number starts from 1, at new day open
- Enable Advance Booking - activates advance booking feature for the outlet
- Send email of bill - email is sent to the clients email information if collected in CRM
- Send SMS of bill - sms is sent to the clients mobile number information if collected in CRM (transactional module required
- Disable Bill RoundOff - does not auto round off the bill
- No punch Of Item/Discount after Print: Item/ Discount - disables the ability to punch more items/ discount after printing a bill
- Comment on re-print Bill - requirement for comment on re-printing a bill
- Disable Transfer of: Bill/Kot/Item - blocks transfer of specific bill/ Kot/ item
- Hide Discount Amount Field - hide discount amount field for billing
- Max no of addons - set a max addon's in total which can be punched onto a bill
- Max quantity of each addons - set max qty of each addon which can be punched onto a bill
- AddOn Compulsory - select between addons being compulsory/ optional for all addon mapped items
-Stop Modify Bill Before CutOff Time (In Hrs.) - can set a cut off time to prevent any modification of bills
- Max addOn from each category - set max addon which can be selected from each category
- Hide Category In Billing - hides the category filter bar from billing pos
- Disable BackDate Expense - prevents any backdated expenses from being logged onto expense module
- Manual Qty Entry Sweet Shop - with sweet shop functionality, has access to manually enter numbers rather than selecting
- Set Current User as Waiter - defaults the current user to the waiter for reporting purposes
- Enable Made/Unmade Option - gives option to mark made(ready) for delivery/takeaway
- Show Serial Number On TakeOut/Delivery Bill - provides the serial number of the bill on takeout/delivery bills
- Tabwise Bill Series (For Cloud Kitchen) - separate bill series as per different brands(Cloud kitchen tabs)
- Tabwise Bill Series (For IOT) - separate the bill series as per different format tabs(IOT)
- Specific Tabwise Bill Series (For IOT) - CHECK
- Enable Comment on Split Bill - require to enter in a comment when splitting a bill
- Change Status After Split Bill - CHECK
- Hide Item Search - hides the item search and item punch from the top right section of Billing POS
- Decimal Places - enables decimal places within billing
- Disable Void Bills - prevents voiding bills from billing operations
- Round Off Near 5 - rounds of prices ranging from 1 - 4 to Rs 5, or Rs 10 respectively, maintaining ""no change"" aspect
- Enable Transfer Across TabTypes: Takeout/ Delivery  - grants access to transferring tables or orders across tab; takeaway/delivert to dine in
- Enable Split Before Print KOT - enables user to split a table order before punching the KOT (Button shows up below the Print KOT Option)
- Disable Void KOT after Print Bill - blocks voiding a KOT after print is completed
- Enable Multi Split - gives access to Multi Split a bill(split a bill into multiple parts - not just 2); however once split, cannot be split again
- Enable Customer Display - for use in KDS, to allow clients to see the orders punched
- Set Passcode User as Waiter - opening a table with passcode, associates that user as the waiter of the table(for reporting)
- Disable KDS Update message - skips KDS Updates message prompt
- Enable Banquet Split - access to splitting banquet reservations payments
- Disable Bill Editing and Voiding After Cutoff Time - Blocks find bill feature of editing and voiding after the day cut off time
- Add Manual Weight - similar to sweet shop usage - selecting an item gives prompt box to enter qty of the item and weightage to calculate the pricing
- Show Bill Number on Table - displays Bill number on billing table view screen
- Enable Transfer from Table to : Takeout/Delivery - access to transferring bills from table to takeout/delivery
- Consecutive Bill Series (For IOT) - bill series allocate in a consecutive manner across the different terminals, with IOT (Default off, is separate series per terminal)"

- Some restaurants run and are active till early morning 2 or 3 AM.
The cut off time, by default is 5AM, any bills punched before this time reflect for the previous days reports


Outlet Cut off time can be amended, but changes take effect from the 1st of the next month.
(The reason for this is to ensure the monthly reporting cycle doesn't get affected)
Settle Bill on Print: joins Settle and Bill print option into one action
Other Settings are available for Settle by user, and to ENABLE/DISABLE relevant Payment Modes
Includes PAYMENT GATEWAYS MODES / BANK MODES / WALLETS / ONLINE PAYMENT MODES
TIPS can be enabled through this menu Settings (only available for card payment modes)
- Sort by Item Number - format of sorting
- Sort by Alphabetic - format of sorting
- Bar Exchange IP (not in use anymore)
- Enable Item Image - POS/ Online Order - shows images uploaded at the brand level on the chosen platform
- Menu Item Alphanumeric - format of sorting
- Sort Addon by Item Number - format of sorting for addons
- Combined Menu for UrbanPiper - enable to utilize 1 Tab for online aggregators through UrbanPiper"
- Activate inclusive Tax - tax gets included in the pricing (Gulf regions)
- Bill wise offer taxation fix - enabling(default) this setting, applies tax according to the offer of discount (100 - 90 post discount, tax calculated on 90, instead of 100)
- Remove Taxes Manually - can be used to remove Service Tax on bills
- HSN/SAC Number - can be assigned if a generic number needs to be added
- Enable Tax on Addon - addon prices get taxed
- Enable Tax Before Discount - (not in use)
- UTGST applied - can be enabled for Union Territories (Statewise)
- Apply Automatic Discounts
- Discount on Addons
- Enable Bill Express Offer - hide the express offer option
- Comment on Offers - makes comments mandatory on offers
- Allow Offer to Waiter - allow permissions for waiters to apply offers
- Disable Discount on AddOn on Bill Wise Offers - removes AddOns from the discount criteria
- Comment on Item Wise Offers - makes comments mandatory for Item Wise Offers
- Disable Item Wise Express Offer - hide the express offer from item modifier section(3 dots button)
- Redeem Loyalty Points as discount - used with integration with Capillary"
- Show Offers Applied on Bill -  offers get included in the clients bill
- Delivery Boy Selection Required - makes mandatory for either ""Take out/Delivery"" type formats
- Waiter Selection required - makes mandatory
- Restaurant Capacity - can be used to define max numerical capacity for the restaurant
- Enable Covers - turn on the option to enter and track covers for the required format
- No. of Tables - can be used to define and showcase number of tables at the front end POS
- Cover Mandatory - make the tracking of covers mandatory for the required format."

- Multiple options accessible to enable or disable passcode requirement for activities such as:
Discount
Void Bill
Re-Print Bill / Re-Print KOT
Table Access
Express Offer
Split Bill
Stock In/ Stock Out
Table transfer
Sweet Shop
Bypass Passcode for Item Comment
Table (Non-IOT)
Advance Bill Accept/Reject
Use Waiter Passcode for Delivery/Takeaway

Maintaining separate User Passcodes, can help TRACK which user is performing which function within the billing operations.
- Enable CRM Alert on Bill - alert to collect client info for selected tab
- Enable CRM Mandatory on Bill - mandatory requirement to collect client info for selected tab to print a bill*
- Skip CRM By Manager Passcode - manager passcode can skip mandatory CRM requirement
- Add Customer Information Without Bill
- Disable Customer Info on Printed Bill - hides CRM data on the bill
- Max/ Min Number of Digit in mobile (CRM) - limits entry of data into the CRM (10 digits - India)
- Optional Customer Name - can make customer name as Optional - mandatory only number, sorted by numbers
- Enable CRM Compulsory on Bill - mandatory requirement to collect client info for selected tab to punch an order*
- Allow Zero in Mobile number - 0 as first digit
- Enable Country Code in CRM - can add country code at the start of the mobile number"

- Settlement Modes can be customized as per the Instance/Terminal Needs.
Example:
T1 - can be set for Cash and Card Only.
T2 - can be set for Online, Others, Btc
- Enable Petty Cash - activates Petty cash for that Outlet
- Enter Cash on Opening Shift - Opening and Closing the day asks for cash balance available
- Denomination mandatory in Petty Cash
- Validate Shift Opening and Closing Amount - validates and checks for variance with the opening and closing amount available in the system and what's entered
- Validate Day Closing Amount - post the previous step, also validates day closing amount
- Blind Closing - system won't notify of variance(hides from cashier) - but reports showcase the variance - for short/extra cash
- Max Shift Closing Attempts - can be set
- Enable Shift Transfer can be set for use - transfer balance of cash to other user
- Disable Shift management
Print receipt for shift - can be enabled to get a hard copy of shift amt
- Enable Shift Verification - cashier has to verify with manager - manager re-closes cashiers shift post verification.
- Use permission for Cash Drawer - only selected users can be given access to Cash Drawer(this is besides bill settling) - bill settle auto opens for all
- Enable Open Cash Drawer in Petty Cash - Main Cash Drawer Setting - to open the Cash Drawer for set billing operations
- Match Logged in user with Shift User - only User that is logged into the system can login to shift"
- Max Cash in Till - can set a max amount - where the software will prompt to cash out from till to office

Available Options:
- Instance Server - used to enter the IP address port number (http://192.168.190.9000) of the IOT box (IOT setups only)
- Show Food Cost as Ideal Cost
- Activate Virtual Keyboard - can be used to set up keyboard pop ups for touch screen pos
- Enable Notifications - FOR ANTI THEFT MODULE; managers can receive anti theft notifications(void/discounts applied done by which user) - needs to be activated from the backend
- Enable Insights - FOR COCKPIT APPLICATION - showcases additional insights
- Independent Instance - Enabled to PAUSE IOT setup, and use only the terminals independently (bill series will be separate)
- Render Super Category in Double Row - activates 2 rows instead of default 1 row
- Royalty_Percentage - currently not in use
- Punch Same Combo Together - if 2 or more combos are punched constituents will show clubbed together, instead of separately.
- Enable Other Option in Complimentary Head - Complimentary head gives other option for settlement
- Enable Change in Item Rate - Access given to the Front POS user to manually edit the rate of any item (not recommended - disabled by default)
- Separate Dispatch Button (Delivery) - Under Delivery, "Show Orders", gives Dispatch Time button as an additional step. If disabled, print bill time will be considered dispatch time.
- Use Predefined Comment as Item Comment - enables dropdown to use Predefined Comments for item comment
- Enable New Split Methods - creates option for blank and equal split
- Enable Manual Order ID - right clicking on a table/delivery table gives option to manually enter Order ID's
- Check for Daily Physical Entry in Kitchen - mandatory requirement to perform physical entry in kitchen, otherwise closing day won't be possible.
- Enable Out of Stock - Sheet provision to enter opening stock of all items at the start of the day, so it auto marks out of stock, once complete.
- Only Use Item Search (Server App) - for server app - punching orders, only searching option is available, not through category wise.
- Use Confirmation for Print Bill(Server App) - confirmation setting to avoid double clicking on server app.
- Keyboard Size (1-5) - for virtual keyboard.
- Disable Barcode Search - can assign barcodes to items, this search feature can be disabled.
- Enable Item Search Topbar - gives search bar to filter out items directly on front POS
- Enable Non Residential Cover Flag - for Hotelogix (Property Management Software)
- Disable Void Item after Settlement - prevents Voiding any item post settlements
- Enable Printing Day End slip - gives access to end Day Print Slip (top right corner dropdown option)
- Auto Lock If Idle(In Minutes) - set time for automatic lock of user screen, user password required to unlock
- Use Predefined Discount For Item Express Discount - replaces express discounts with only the ability to use predefined discounts.
- Realtime KDS - punching an item pushes it directly to KDS, no requirement to print KOT first
- Enable Assorted Items - allows multiple items to be bundled into a package - example Hamper
- Enable Reorder - activate option to reorder KOT or individual items
- Enable Split by Amount - Split option gets activated under splitting a bill (customizable amount)
- Enable Split after split with items(For IOT only) - allows a bill to be re-split as per requirements; merging not an option
- Enable Qty via Button - clicking in between + and - of quantity gives the option to manually enter in the quantity
- Used to assign INDIVIDUAL items from categories which to printers to bypass the Category mapping.

- Used in outlets with IOT setups - or multiple instances. (especially where location of the printers are separated by different floors)
(POSist Print Utility has to be running to read printers installed under the control panel)

- Top Section - is used for Assigning Terminal Activity to the BILLS Printer.


- Lower Section - is used for Assigning Terminal Activity to the KOT Printer

Available Options:
- Printer Server - all printers should be installed on a main server(PC) - the IP address of the system is recorded here as the Main Print Server example 192.168.1.178 (Utility should only be installed on the main server)
(using "localhost" - the print commands go to the same respective system *UTILITY to be installed on all systems)
- Station Wise Print - needs to be enabled for station wise printer to be active, else all print commands go to the default control panel printer
- Enable e-POS Epson TM-i Print - can use 1 cloud printer - this enables the cloud printer / IP for which needs to be assigned under the setting "EPSON Printer IP"(2nd last option of the same section)
- Print Bill By Cashier Only - for specific tabs can restrict Bill printing to the Cashier Users only.
- Enable Bluetooth Printer - enables bluetooth printing (can be used for only single bluetooth printer / tablet to BT printer) 
Caution with BT printer - wait for 2 - 3 seconds post KOT print to print the Bill (to avoid missing the 2nd print)
Also, in BT Printers, merging KOT - Bill Print / KOT - Bill Print - Settlement WON't Work (BT printer can only receive 1 command at a time)
DO NOT USE the Setting "Enable Bluetooth Printer" if using BT print Utility on the tablet
- Print Delivery Message - enables the option to print delivery message with KOT's
- Bill Print Optional - prompt is enabled on whether a bill print is required - OK/ Cancel
- Activate New Print Utility - (Default activated)
- Print DMP Activate For - used for Dot matrix printer - enable if this type of printing is used for KOT/ Bill
- Print Default Size - default size is 10 , can be lowered or increased: 8 - 13
- Print Default Bold - default enabled - highlights the printing to be more clearer
- Use EPSON SDK - IPADS have access to enabling the IP address of the respective printer (this setting activates the IPAD operating system for this print forwarding)
Note: 1 IPAD can be linked to 1 printer, not more than 1. However multiple IPADS can be set on 1 printer, or separate printers this way
- Use Item wise Stations - enabled to activate Item Wise Station Printing (otherwise default is category station wise printing)

Available Options:
- Category-Wise Print Kot - separates each category on the KOT, ex - shakes, juices, mocKTails will show up in separate sections.
- Enable Comment on KOT Print - gives a KOT Comment Button(above total amount & taxes) while punching in a KOT
- Disable KOT - skip KOT and proceed directly to Bill
- Print KOT with bill - KOT and bill print merges into 1 action
- KOT Print Copies - can increase number of copies more than default 1
- Master KOT Enable For Food/ Liquor - Master KOT printer will default print 
- Enable Separate Punch Item in KOT - punching a similar item will show as separate counts instead of clubbed together
- KOT Print Template Number - with the field blank, a default template is used, but if a specific template number is used, a different format can be tested **Refer KOT Print Template Document - websitedheko.com/OPS**
- Disable Print KOT number on bill - hides KOT number from the bill
- Hold and Fire Bill - Option to punch a full KOT, but keep the items on hold, sending 1 item at a time, for example Starters > Main Course> Desserts (Show H/F Items Button on KOT Punching screen)
- KOT Print Option - prompt is enabled on whether a KOT print is required - OK/ Cancel

- Print Item Size in KOT / Print Bill No Size(KOT) / Print Steward Size(KOT) / Print Table No Size(KOT)  - control individual font sizes, default is 10
- Master KOT Instance Wise - The Master Station Category Printer, if print is enabled from T1/T2/ other terminals; these can be separated to other printers.
- Hide on Printed KOT - option to hide: Table Number/ Tab Name/ Bill Number/ Order Number/ Waiter Name/ KOT Number/ Covers/ Customer Into
- Print Item Wise KOT - separates each item on the KOT, This Prints Item Wise KOT + Consolidated KOT.
- Disable Consolidated KOT for Item Wise - blocks Consolidated KOT from the above setting for relevant Format
- Print Running Order Tag on KOT - if punching a new KOT for an existing table; PRINTS a "Running Order Tag" on it - so that the chef is made aware and can prioritize kitchen preparations
- Disable Zomato/Swiggy Order Print - zomato orders automatically print a bill - this option disables the print (no longer in use)
- Hide Total Qty Field in KOT - hides total qty field from being showcased on KOT
- Mark Separate Items in KOT - enables a "mark Checkbox" when punching KOT - checking the box, puts a section separation post that item.
- Print Offer in KOT - showcases offers applied on KOT
- Disable Logo on KOT - hides logo on KOT
- Table Transfer Print on KOT Printer - transferring a table, causes a new hard copy KOT receipt to showcase this billing operation
- Combo Constituent Item Station Print - This needs to be enabled for Station wise printing; IF a combo constituents a meal + beverage, which is to go to separate KOT printers; Meal > 1st Printer; Beverage > 2nd printer
- Enable Short Name on Print KOT - allows shortnames for KOT's; this is assigned to items at the Brand level "Item Shortname Tab"
- Online Order Info on KOT - Online Orders aggregator info can be displayed on the KOT.
- Enable KOT Item Wrapping - wraps the text to the next line (Clearler Font formatting); as only 10 characters can be displayed via the thermal Printer
- Enable Room No. Print - Hotelogix room number gets printed on the bill
- Enable Button to send KOT on Bill Printer - optional button to send KOT print through the Bill printer instead
- Enable Void KOT Print on Bill Printer after Settlement - any voidation post settlement of a bill, gets a Void KOT print through the bill printer, if enabled

Available Options:
- Re-print Bill - enables access to reprinting (can be blocked for anti theft purposes)
- Category- Wise Split Bill - Split up the bill, category wise (similar to category wise KOT split)
- Header on Bill - Address/Gst details as per client can be put and customized.
32 characters fit on one line on the 3 inch thermal printer (with default font size)
- Footer on Bill - feedback/ thank you, other details can be displayed in bottommost section of the bill
- Bill Print Copies - can be increased or decreased
- Bill SMS Outlet Name - on the Billing SMS(transactional sms, purchased separate module), can customize the name of the outlet in this field
- Bill Print Template Number - choice of template formats can be chosen for bills - **Refer KOT Print Template Document - websitedheko.com/OPS**
- Separate Food Liquor - enables a different bill print for Liquor from food
- Header/ Footer on Food Liquor Bill - this can be customized separately from the regular bill if selecting the above option
- Suffix on Food/ Liquor Bill - Characters - Alphanumeric can be used as a code for the ending of the bill for identification
- Bill Print Prefix - Characters - Alphanumeric can be used as a code for the start of the bill for identification
- GSTIN Number - can be entered in this field to be added into the Bill Header
- Send Link of the Bill - send an sms with Bill Link (PDF copy of bill)
- Left Space in Bill -  in case a bill gets cut from the left side , you can shift 2/3 or more characters to the right by keeping a left size space
- Delivery Bill Copies - for delivery tab enables set number of copies (by default 1)
- Hide Food Liquor Total in Separate Bill - based on the "Separate Food Liquor" setting, will show only totals of food/ Liquor, not both
- POS Code - some restaurants have POS system codes, which can be entered to show on the bill
- Print After Settle Copies - Post settling a bill, set number of print copies of the bill required
- Print Table/ Bill Number/ Steward Size - can set the font sizes for these respective sections on the bill
- Print Show Pay Value - at the end of the bill introduces a "To Pay" amount in clear larger font size(For client to easily see)
- Print Total Qty Size - increase/ decrease Total Qty Font size
- Enable Bill Items Wrapping - wrap text of the bill items, same as KOT, to be more presentable
- Print Transaction Info on Bill - can enable: credit card/ debit card/ coupon/ online/ other settlement info to be shown on the bill
- Disable Printing of NC Bills - allows disabling No Charge / 0 bills, either with or without confirmation. (as it is a 0 charge bill, printing might not be required)
- Enable Print Change Due on Bill - shows "change/ balance payable to client" info on the bill
- Header on QR on Bill - field to customize header of QR bills
- Enable Open Cash Drawer - Cash Drawers can be linked to the system(printer); enabling this setting will open the cash drawer either at Print Bill/ Settlement action.
- Only Cash Settlement Open Cash Drawer - Cash Drawers can be linked to the system(printer); enabling this setting will open the cash drawer only for "CASH" Settlement action
- Enable Comment on Bill - creates a "Bill Comment Button" on the KOT punching screen, a bill comment can be added which will be printed on KOT & Bill Print.
- Hide on Printed Bill - enables option to hide fields: Table Number/ Tab Name/ Bill Number/ Waiter Name/ Delivery Boy Name/ Cashier Name/ Covers/ Payment Info
- Enable Open Cash Drawer Button - option to open Cash Drawer manually. - this button is available from Top right corner dropdown(user name)
- Print Customer Loyalty Points on the Bill - enabling this setting showcases Customer Loyalty Points on the bill
- Print Call Center User Name: Bill/ KOT - if an order is placed from the Call Center Application 
- Stop Zero Value Print on Bill - any items created of 0 value can be skipped on the bill with this setting
- Alias For Pay(Max 15 Length) - apply an alias name for "To Pay Value" on the Bill; example: "Total"
- Enable Short Name on Print Bill - allows shortnames for KOT's; this is assigned to items at the Brand level "Item Shortname Tab"
- Page Line Length A4/A5 - can set limit of number of lines for A4/A5, before continuing to the next page of the printing(not for thermal printers)
- Hide Bill Comments - can hide comments on the final bill
- Alias for Customer GSTIN - in countries other than India, they might have taxes other than GST, can rename and keep a different Alias here for the bill
- Disable Table Transfer Print on Bill Printer - The action of transferring a table normally prints out a transfer ticket on the bill printer; this feature disables the print
- Print Order Number in Bold & For Table - bold/ highlights the Order Number non the Bill
- Print Order Number Size - Size of Order number displayed can be increased/ decreased (linked to the above setting)
- Enable KOT comment on bill - show or hide the KOT comments to reflect on bill (normally only reflects on KOT)
- GEC Store ID - (Client specific for 'Taco Bell') - a  unique store ID is shared with POSist, and we enter this in the field provided The store ID is linked with the Bill and codes are generated with Taco Bell's back end software
- Print Total Amount Size - "Total Amount" size can be entered else it is specific to the Bill Template; default used if blank
- Print Label Template - template number can be chosen for labels; default used if blank
- Advanced Booking Template - template numbers can be chosen for advance booking bills; default used if blank

Available Options:
- Bump Bill from Kitchen Screen - 
KDS has two main screens(or more) - the Chefs Screen + the Steward Screen;
This feature is enabled, if you do not want to MANUALLY push the orders from the Chef Screen to the next, Steward Screen, it happens automatically.
- Enable Audio on New Order in KDS - enables audio sound; rings for incoming new orders
- Trigger MFR via KDS - post bumping an order, you can mark an item as Mark Food Ready as a notification for delivery riders

- Set Colour codes for each order box on the KDS screen to signify how much time has lapsed/passed since the order was placed.
Example - 5 minutes since order placed - ORANGE 
10 minutes since order placed - YELLOW
15 minutes since order placed - RED (to define priority)

Items can be punched for taking a client's order by using the following 3 methods:

Manual Entry Item & Quantity - manually enter in the item name and quantity and click add from the top right bar

Customer Relationship Management:

Offers/ Discounts can be applied to the entire Bill in two forms:

- Predefined Offers (created under Offers Module)
- Apply Express Offer (Manually choosing % or Amount of discount)

The Offers interface also can be used to delete an Offer previously applied - "Red Delete button" at the bottom left of the interface.

Ewards/ Discount Coupon Codes can also be applied as per Coupon Codes created from Offers Module.

Below Offers Button, you can click on the red substract button Tax Amount.
This gives access to review the tax breakup being applied on the bill.

If Setting "Remove Tax Manually" is applied, using passcode, can give access to removing certain taxes as per operations requirement
Example: Service tax/ GST on SC

GST cannot be removed.

Hitting Print KOT - sends the order punched to the KITCHEN Printers for preparation.
You can go back to punch other orders by clicking "Dine In" or any other tabs.

KOT Settings(Cogs/Gears button) is available to 
Void KOT - delete the KOT in cart
Reprint KOT - send a new print copy to the kitchen
Copy KOT - Copy the KOT and can paste it on another table (if a client wants to shift table)
Send a Kitchen Message - Send a message to the Kitchen regarding existing KOT (Brand: Predefined Comments tagged to Kitchen message)

Once the whole order is completed, the bill Print Button can be used to print a bill from the Billing Counter.
You can go back to punch other orders by clicking "Dine In" or any other tabs.

Table View Shows details of: Table Number, Customer Name, Total Bill Value, Bill Value per Cover, Time Elapsed since punching the KOT
Right Clicking on the table gives options to: Edit Covers/ Copy/ Void/ Split Bill (Discussed in next Table Settings)


Printing a bill can be merged with Settlement as per operational requirements (Deployment Configurations)
"Settle on Print"

Right Clicking on the table gives options to: 
Edit Covers - change number of covers associated with the bill (incase more customers join the table)
Copy - can copy and paste to move the bill to a new table
Void - cancel the entire bill
Reprint Bill - Bill copy can be reprinted(once already printed)

Split Bill (Discussed in next Table Settings) - Split bill in multiple parts as per:
Normal Split/ Splitting Automatically by Category/ Split by Food & Liquor/ Equal Split/ Blank Split(split a new blank table to punch more items)/ Amount Split

A bill can finally be settled at the time of receiving payment. Settlement Modes include:

Cash - Denominations can be chosen manually to calculate change. Or Add Cash Payment can be simply clicked if exact amount is received.
Credit Card - Choice of card can be chosen(master/visa etc); Transaction number(last 4 digits of card- NOT required); 
Debit Card - Choice of card can be chosen(master/visa etc); Transaction number(last 4 digits of card- NOT required); 
Coupons - Sodexo/ tickets/ Meal Vouchers etc
Online - COD/ online modes example zomato/ swiggy/ fassos/ swiggy etc...
Others - collection through other modes - paypal/ Gpay etc
BTC - Bill on hold/ bill to company on credit for future payments

Search for previously settled bills through multiple filters: date, tab, amount, name etc

Find Bill gives access(based on user permissions) to Reprint a bill, void a bill, review Summary of the bill.
It also gives access to Editing a bill - Edit the existing bill (Editing access only available for upto 5 days in the past)

to check clients visiting multiple, or fewer times as per frequency.

Formal Communication of orders placed between Kitchen and Store;
▪ Orders: generate order request for indent by the kitchen to store/vice versa
▪ Pending  Indents: review pending order requests placed at the respective kitchen/store
▪ Supply Orders: open incoming orders and process supplied quantities with comments 
▪ Receive Orders: open and validate/acknowledge the quantity received
▪ Suspicious Supplied Indents: if supplied quantity varies from requested > can be accepted or rejected
If Accepted: can mark stock for re-use/wastage
If Rejected: the entry is sent to the Store as Suspicious Received Indents
▪ Suspicious Received Indents: rejected Suspicious by store comes goes back to the Suspicious claiming party.
They again have a choice to reject sending it back to Suspicious Supplied Indents (3 cycles limit - then Suspense Account)
▪ Return: search for indents during date range and return indents to supplier(store)
▪ Process Return: collect returns of stock and mark stock for re-use/wastage
▪ Templates: add frequent Item Indents for immediate use as per a fixed templates

Formal Communication from one Outlet to another/ Base Kitchen to Outlet;
▪ Orders: generate order request for indent by the outlet to the base kitchen/vice versa
▪ Pending  Indents: review pending order requests placed at the respective outlet
▪ Dispatch: Direct Dispatch(DD) of items to the outlet from Base Kitchen (without formal Order(Indent) being placed)
▪ Supply Orders: open incoming orders and process supplied quantities with comments  to Outlet
▪ Receive Orders: open and validate/acknowledge the quantity received
▪ Suspicious Supplied Indents: if supplied quantity varies from requested > can be accepted or rejected
If Accepted: can mark stock for re-use/wastage
If Rejected: the entry is sent to the Base Kitchen as Suspicious Received Indents
▪ Suspicious Received Indents: rejected Suspicious by store comes goes back to the Suspicious claiming party.
They again have a choice to reject sending it back to Suspicious Supplied Indents (3 cycles limit - then Suspense Account)
▪ Return: search for indents during date range and return indents to supplier(Base kitchen)
▪ Process Return: collect returns of stock and mark stock for reuse/wastage
▪ Bulk Return: return of bulk items stock without searching for the indent(multiple indents might be involved)
Return & Process Return Tabs available
▪ Templates: add frequent Item Indents for immediate use as per a fixed templates

Formalized two way method of purchasing materials for Stock
▪ Order: Create Order request from Vendors
▪ Open POs: while accepting the order - can modify created PO's, or settle the entry >System redirects to 'Stock Entry To complete this step
▪  Vendor Debit: if Vendors short supplies materials, we can obtain difference of price through a vendor debit entry to balance accounts (incase the rates are higher than our contract pricing)
We can debit the difference/ charge the difference to the Vendor

Sale of stock to third party
▪ Sales Order: create order as per 3rd party request. Print Delivery Challan
▪ Open SOs: Either raise a production request/Supply items requested in the Order
▪ Production Requests: any requests for Sales order which require production can be received at the Kitchen >produced and then supplied
▪ Generate Invoice: search and find and generate invoice/challans, if not previously done(1 time invoice generation)
▪ Reprint Invoice: search and find and generate invoice/challans, this is only for re-reprint facility
▪ Return: make entries back into the system, if the 3rd party returns the stock back

If the company has a centralized Purchase Department, a Purchase requisition request is placed to the Purchase Department.
The purchase team procures the items required.
▪ Requisition: order raised to the Purchase Department
PD ID: Opens Pending PR: and Raises a PO
▪ Pending PRs: review existing PR's; Opening redirects to Stock Entry
▪ Vendor Debit:

▪ Recipe Report: Generate and view Recipe Costs based on Purchase Entries of materials.
Viewable in Average Pricing & Last Price 
▪ Recipe Report Summary: Same report, displaying only base recipe, without ingredients
▪ Material Estimation: Prediction module to estimate cost of orders and can be exported.

Purchased materials to be returned back to the vendor
▪ Return to Vendor: Input reverse entries back to the vendors
▪ Return from Receiver: input reverse entries sold to 3rd parties which are being returned back
▪ Open Return: review return entries

Recording Payment entries which are due or settled.
▪ Choose Entry Type and Vendor > Make Payment. Payment Mode can be selected, in half/full

Large scale companies record entries of people with Gate Pass (Security Team)
▪ Receive Gate Pass: Security Teams Open generated gatepasses and receive entries from the suppliers 
▪ Process Gate Pass: Redirected to Stock Sale

▪ Can search and reprint entries from any module & sub-module
▪ Logs available for view to see how many times a transaction has been reprinted

Used to create Pre defined Production Plans > Find Estimate raw materials for a select Plan
Planning:
▪ New Plan - create or add new plan or variations by selecting a date, items with quantities to be used for the plan
▪ Manage Plans - to view, modify or settle existing Production Plans

Procurement: used to search for past created plans, and can showcase an estimate of all raw materials needed
▪ Options to edit the quantity as per choice, or proceed to Procuring
▪ Procuring: Can be done via:
        1.  Internal Indenting: Kitchen Team raises a procurement request > Items go to the store > store issues materials to the kitchen > kitchen receives the materials
        2. Direct Transfer: Manual procurement, store procures, and updates via direct transfer from the production plan section

Production: once raw materials are procured, 'Perform Production' can be selected.
Expected qty is shown, and manual inputs of actual produced qty can be entered to realise variances
